subcodes.first_line: The affliction of the world proceedeth from the ignorant one who adorneth himself with the ornaments of knowledge and maketh a show thereof amongst the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مصیبت عالم از جاهلیست که خود را بطراز علم مزین نماید و ظاهر کند چه که عباد
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
